title: Top K Frequent Elements
prompt:
Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the k most frequent elements. You may return the answer in any order.

It is guaranteed that the answer is unique (no ties at the k-th position).

For example, given nums = [1,1,1,2,2,3] and k = 2, the two most frequent elements are 1 (appears 3 times) and 2 (appears 2 times), so return [1, 2].
constraints: k is in the range [1, number of unique elements]
The answer is guaranteed to be unique

notesForAI.coreIdea: Count frequencies with a hash map, then use a min-heap of size k or bucket sort to extract the k most frequent elements.
commonBugs: Using a max-heap instead of min-heap (less efficient)
Forgetting that output order doesn't matter
notesForAI.expectedComplexity: O(n log k) with heap, O(n) with bucket sort
